channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: Transmigrated Into an Ancient Famine Novel as a Scumbag Alpha (ABO, GL) — Chapter 171
item.description: Chapter 171 The next morning, Ye Qing came to wake the two little bundles. She saw both little ones sleeping soundly on the bed. Her Tan’er sprawled messily, while Xiao Bai slept neatly, lying flat and peacefully. Ye Qing gently patted her kid, “Tan’er, get up.” The little one rubbed her eyes, grumbled a bit,…

item.title: Dressed as the Scumbag Alpha Mom of the Tragic Female Lead (ABO, GL) — Chapter 168
item.description: Chapter 168 “Hello,” Jiang Chuxie said, unsure how long she’d be gone or if she’d lose contact with the outside world. She needed to arrange everything beforehand. “Hi.” The person on the other end seemed to expect her call, speaking calmly. “Aunt Jiang, hello.” “You knew I’d call.” Jiang Chuxie sensed it from her tone.…

item.title: After the Top Idol Omega and I Started Living Together — Chapter 134
item.description: Chapter 134 Today, the sunshine was just right, and the snow on the tree branches melted a bit under the sun. The falling snow made no sound, but it shook the flexible pine branches up and down, swaying right behind Lu Xu. It had been a while since they last met. The last time Lu…

item.title: Accidentally Marked My Ex’s Crush, the Ice-Cold Goddess O — Chapter 133 You Are My Family
item.description: Chapter 133: You Are My Family On the way back, the two reviewed what happened that night and raised a question at the same time. Gu Feiran said, “About my maternity leave, the director promised to keep it a secret and not tell anyone. Even if he did, he would only know I’m pregnant and…
